hero.title: Transportation
hero.description: Hamrahbar provides all loading, tracking, settlement, and fleet management processes in one modern, integrated panel.

services.title: Hamrahbar Solutions
services.registerLoadDesc: Complete loading and unloading management with a simple, unified interface.
services.validationDesc: Automated real-time validation of fleet, driver, and waybill information.
services.pricingDesc: Automatic and accurate freight cost calculation based on route, weight, and cargo type.
services.dashboardDesc: Real-time reports and analytics for all logistics operations.

about.title: The Hamrahbar Story
about.description: We came to bring smart transportation to Iran's logistics industry.
about.storyTitle: From an Idea to a National Platform
about.storyP1: Hamrahbar was born in 2021 with the goal of solving the major challenges of the country's transportation industry. Our concern was always: why should cargo owners and drivers work through multiple intermediaries?
about.storyP2: We decided to build a smart platform that directly connects cargo owners to drivers, reduces costs, and brings transparency back to the transportation industry.
about.missionDesc: Creating a smart and transparent platform for directly connecting cargo owners and drivers, aiming to reduce costs and increase productivity in the country's transportation industry.
about.visionDesc: Becoming the largest and most trusted smart transportation platform in Iran and the region, by creating a complete logistics ecosystem.
about.valuesDesc: Transparency, Trust, Innovation, Speed, and Respect for users. We work every day to improve user experience.
about.whyDesc: Four main reasons to choose Hamrahbar
about.reason1Desc: No intermediaries, cargo owners and drivers connect directly.
about.reason2Desc: Transparent and secure payment system with full financial tracking.
about.reason3Desc: Our support team is always with you to ensure the best experience.
about.reason4Desc: Using the latest technologies for real-time tracking and smart management.

drivers.title: With Drivers
drivers.description: More loads, better income, smarter routes.
drivers.benefit1Desc: Access to diverse loads and guaranteed monthly income
drivers.benefit2Desc: Route optimization to reduce fuel consumption and time
drivers.benefit3Desc: Load management, tracking, and direct communication with cargo owner
drivers.benefit4Desc: Verification system and freight payment guarantee
drivers.step1Desc: Enter your personal information and documents
drivers.step2Desc: Your documents are reviewed by our team
drivers.appDesc: See and accept new loads anytime, anywhere.

owners.title: Smart Cargo Management
owners.description: Transport your cargo with the best fleet at the lowest cost.
owners.feature1Desc: Quick load registration with complete information and pricing
owners.feature2Desc: View, edit, and track load status
owners.feature4Desc: View route and cargo location at any moment
owners.feature5Desc: Detailed reports on transportation performance and costs
owners.ctaDesc: Join thousands of cargo owners who trust Hamrahbar for their transportation management.
